seo.title: Shelves | Catalog your collection and share what you love
seo.description: The ultimate mobile companion to showcase, organize, and track your physical collections—powered by OpenAI Vision. Coming soon.

hero.title: Your physical collections, magically organized.
hero.subtitle: Point your camera at your collection and take a shelfy! Shelves instantly catalogs your books, movies, games, and memorabilia.

features.title: Books
features.description: Instantly recognize titles, authors, and editions by simply pointing your camera at your bookshelf.

features.title: Movies & Vinyl
features.description: Automatically retrieve release years, directors, and formats for all your physical media.

features.title: Video Games
features.description: Log your retro cartridges and modern discs with an AI that knows every console generation.

features.title: Private or Public
features.description: Keep your collection completely private, share it with close friends, or publish it to the world.
